00000000: NOP
00000004: ADDI  x10, x0, 0
00000008: ADDI  x11, x0, 5
0000000c: ADDI  x12, x0, 7
00000010: SW    x11, 0(x10)
00000014: SW    x12, 4(x10)
00000018: LW    x13, 0(x10)
0000001c: LW    x14, 4(x10)
00000020: ADD   x15, x13, x14
00000024: SUB   x16, x14, x13
00000028: AND   x17, x13, x14
0000002c: OR    x18, x13, x14
00000030: XOR   x19, x13, x14
00000034: ANDI  x20, x15, 15
00000038: ORI   x21, x16, 1
0000003c: BEQ   x11, x12, 8
00000040: ADDI  x22, x0, 123
00000044: BNE   x11, x12, 8
00000048: ADDI  x23, x0, 999
0000004c: JAL   x1, 12
00000050: ADDI  x24, x0, 42
00000054: JAL   x0, 16
00000058: ADDI  x25, x0, 1
0000005c: ADD   x26, x20, x25
00000060: JALR  x0, 0(x1)
00000064: NOP
